strategy: He self-buffs every Round with Catch of the Day, gaining two chromatic blades that grow +5% each Round up to +40%; do not let him ramp for long.
Critically, if you defeat him while his Catch of the Day cheat is still active, he revives at full health, so you cannot simply burst him down.

At the end of Round 3 (and after any revive) he gives every wizard an Ice Wyvern card; cast that Ice Wyvern (or another Ice charm-remover like Frost Giant) to strip his blades and permanently stop the cheat.
Once his cheat is disabled with the Ice Wyvern he no longer revives; then finish him normally.
So: survive to Round 3, use the given Ice Wyvern to shut off his cheat, then kill him.
cheatNotes: Every Round he gains two chromatic blades that grow to +40%; his damage ramps fast, so shut the cheat down rather than trading hits.
If you kill him while Catch of the Day is still active, he revives at full health; you must disable the cheat first.
At the end of Round 3 and after any revive he hands each wizard an Ice Wyvern; this card is your key to stopping his cheat.
Casting the given Ice Wyvern strips his blades and permanently ends the Catch of the Day cheat, so he stops reviving; then kill him normally.
Other Ice charm-removers like Frost Giant also strip his blades and stop the cheat.
